name: Brogent Technologies Inc.
summary: Brogent Technologies Inc., a technology company, provides digital content creation services in Taiwan. Its business primarily includes software and hardware research and development, manufacturing and system integration, theater design, and planning, and construction capabilities. The company's products include i-Ride, a flying theater built on six degrees of freedom motion platform; m-Ride, a flying theater built on the design of 180-degree rotating gondolas; d-Ride, a media based interactive dark ride solution for gaming; and GestureMagic that offers effect-driven 4D experience in gaming. It also provides v-Ride 360, a cylinder screen that provides 360-degree panorama balloon ride; t-Ride, a Jurassic age ride; and Q-Ride, an ultrarealistic ocean VR adventure. Brogent Technologies Inc. was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.
